title: vzBackpack
description: A scrollable backpack for your players to improve inventory management
body:
![https://vzbackpack.virus5947.de/vzBackpackLogo.png](https://vzbackpack.virus5947.de/vzBackpackLogo.png)
![https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.virus5947.de%2Fv1%2Fplugin%2F1&query=%24.plugin.0.version&suffix=-alpha&style=flat&label=vzBackpack&color=darkgreen
](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.virus5947.de%2Fv1%2Fplugin%2F1&query=%24.plugin.0.version&suffix=-alpha&style=flat&label=vzBackpack&color=darkgreen
) ![https://translate.virus5947.de/widget/vzbackpack/svg-badge.svg](https://translate.virus5947.de/widget/vzbackpack/svg-badge.svg)

Introducing **vzBackpack**:  
Your solution for the limited inventory storage when you go on expeditions and adventures.  
This plugin gives your players the ability to have backpacks that you can even scroll through.  
Do you want to place your backpacks in your home so you don't have to carry them around with you?  
No problem.  

Screenshots are outdated since version 0.12-alpha - I will replace them soon!

**Support:**
If you have any question, you need support or you found a bug?  
Hit me up on my discord server: [https://discord.virus5947.de/](https://discord.virus5947.de/)

**Dependencies:**

* Java 21 and higher
* Spigot, Paper or Purpur 1.20.1 - 1.21.4 [Paper/Purpur 1.21+ recommended]
* Port-Forwarding if using internal webserver

* **Optional:** [ForcePack](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/forcepack.45439/) [better resourcepack management]
* **Optional:** [Shopkeepers](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/shopkeepers.80756/) [add -shopkeepers behind give command]


**Features:**

* **Scrollable backpacks:** Easily scroll through your items within the backpack.
* **Colored and animal variations:** Dye your backpack in your favorite color
* **Backpack placement:** Put your backback on the ground and access it anyways
* **Secure access:** Other players need a random code to open someone else's backpack, ensuring your items are safe

**Permissions:**

> **vzbackpack.use** ➡️ Needed to open your own backpack  
> **vzbackpack.use_other** ➡️ Allows players to open backpacks from others  
> **vzbackpack.craft** ➡️ Allows players to craft backpacks [if enabled in config]  
> **vzbackpack.place** ➡️ Allows players to place the backpack in the world  
> **vzbackpack.break** ➡️ Allows players to break a placed backpack to your inventory again  
> **vzbackpack.break_other** ➡️ Allows players to break backpacks from others  
> **vzbackpack.give** ➡️ Gives someone a backpack variant item  
> **vzbackpack.view** ➡️ Allows administrators to open backpacks without the need of the access code  
> **vzbackpack.lang** ➡️ Allows administrators to change the plugin language  
> **vzbackpack.notifyupdate** ➡️ Get notified in-game when a new version is available  
> **vzbackpack.support** ➡️ Gets access to the support command which links to the discord server and displays the support key


**Languages:**
